scaffolds.name: skill
scaffolds.description: Bootstrap a skill skeleton with protocol-only structure, explicit FILL markers, and empty gotchas.

scaffolds.name: shells
scaffolds.description: Install host-facing shell instruction files and runtime-specific wrappers.

scaffolds.name: hooks
scaffolds.description: Install session-start hook stubs and host hook manifests.

scaffolds.name: protocol-blocks
scaffolds.description: Install reusable protocol building blocks without project-specific content.

scaffolds.name: anti-templates
scaffolds.description: Install the explicit list of decisions that must not be templated.
